title: Halal Craft
body:
Hey so i'd like to acknowledge the fact that this is my **first mod**, i'm gonna make more soon so stay tuned

big thanks to glump124 for icon, go check em out on yt he makes peak edits

This mod makes minecraft halal!!!
Since its Ramadan i've decided to make the game punish you for eating the following foods:
- Pork
- Cooked Pork
- Spider Eye
- Zombie Flesh
- Pufferfish

I might add more punishments and some buffs to this mod once I gain the experience for now I'll keep this mod dead.

Find any issues/bugs or if you have some suggestions?
Report them to my discord
